source_excerpt: Over the last 12 months, the all items index increased 4.2 percent before seasonal adjustment.
notes: The figure (4.2%) and caveat ('before seasonal adjustment') match, but the resolved source is the May 2026 CPI Summary, whereas the claim attributes the 12-month period to 'ended January 2026' — a different reporting period than the source filing. This is a citation/attribution mismatch per Rule 6.
